# ruzstd-zbic

Internal, decoder-only fork of [`ruzstd`](https://github.com/KillingSpark/zstd-rs) 0.8.3 for the
Nintendo Switch ZBIC variant. It is vendored for `swiitx-loader-executable` and is not intended as a
general-purpose public crate.

See `VENDORED.md` for provenance and the local changes.
